cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') AS i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
),
sedro_woolley_parcels AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.improvement_building_count
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE (
    lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley'
    OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%'
  )
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113)
  AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) > 0
)
SELECT sw.parcel_number, sw.land_use, sw.acres, COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) AS improvement_building_count, 'MSL low quality improvements' AS match_reasons
FROM sedro_woolley_parcels AS sw
JOIN low_quality_improvements AS lq ON sw.parcel_number = lq.parcel_number
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps ON sw.parcel_number = ps.parcel_number
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Low Quality Residential Dwellings on 1-3 Acre Parcels
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality (MSL), parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
